name: Warwick (BEAUTY AND THE BEAST AU) VERSION 2
description:
Until the last petal falls...
*
SO! I saw a lovely commenter mention having Warwick being a dad in this AU and I couldn't resist making that!!
So, we have darling little Violet and Powder here :D They got turned into lil beasties too!!
It's left up for User to decide if the petal has already fallen or not. He still goes by Warwick but should respond to Vander. There's some reasoning why he changed his name bc I love angst
(He might be a little wonky, I didn't test this bot too much,,,)
(Back into my Stardew Valley era recently btw. I probably won't make bots of my own volition tho cuz idk I've been really into playing the game, not writing for it?)
(I haven't forgotten my fairytale series or my requests I just had a vision of this and had to complete it!! Also idk my period started and I've been locked into my various period comfort bots LMFAO)
creator: deranged_lamb
